final:
module synchronous_counter(
    input CLK,
    input RST,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (RST == 1) begin
            Q <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            Q <= Q + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
